message:
refactor(btree,types,vdbe): simplify balance algorithm, add record comparison, and update deps

- btree/balance.rs: remove ~70 lines of complex cell redistribution
  heuristics in favor of a simpler even-split strategy, reducing
  code complexity while maintaining correctness for page splits
- btree/cursor.rs: add bounds checking in seek operations to prevent
  out-of-range cell index access
- types/record.rs: implement compare_records() for direct record-level
  comparison without full deserialization, enabling faster index lookups
- vdbe/engine.rs: add early-exit optimization for comparison opcodes
  when operands are identical references
- Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock: bump version and update dependency tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
